title: galium porrigens var. porrigens
intro: Galium porrigens var. porrigens, also known as Climbing Bedstraw, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is a climbing or semi-erect plant with small white or pinkish flowers, native to Australia and Tasmania. Galium porrigens var. porrigens has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are thought to be due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function.
